title: Millionaire for a Day
writer: Arthur Guy Empey, William Addison Lathrop
actors: Arthur Guy Empey, Harry Burkhardt, Florence Martin
plot: Bobbie Walters, a cab driver in a Midwest city who is trying to save enough money to marry his sweetheart, Dorothy Wright, an attendant at the cigar and newspaper counter of a large hotel, is able to amass $15,000. He acts like a ...
